notes:
What's New

  • Unified Media Engine: All calls now use LiveKit SFU for better stability and future AI agent support in 1-to-1 calls.
  • Smoother Connection UX: Instant loading indicators when users join, reconnect, or disconnect.
  • Sound Effects: New ambient sounds for participant join/leave, screen sharing, and call events.
  • Auto-Leave: 1-to-1 calls automatically end when your partner disconnects.
